reasoning: Lactate clearance is your key limiter, as shown by a 9.3% power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. Your last ride was a low-intensity cruise, so you are primed for higher intensity work today. Mastering over-unders will be crucial for maintaining consistency on the Alpine Loop's key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4 sets of 8-minute over-unders: 2 minutes at 201W, 1 minute at 242W, repeat twice per set. Recover for 3 minutes at 209W between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
